mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password_hash, real_name, dept_id, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{deptId}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sp.perm_code FROM sys_user_role sur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission srp ON sur.role_id = srp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission sp ON srp.permission_id = sp.id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sp.perm_code
